raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Lewitu/ kas tawâs
Gr: Wahrtis irr/tew ne buhs atstaht/
jo wiꞥſcham ne irr Dalliba neds
Ihpaſchums ar tew.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ap treschu Gaddu buhs
tew isdoht wiſſu tawu Augtu
definitu Teeſu ta paſcha Gadda/
un tew buhs to notikt tawâs
Wahrtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahks tas Lewits/ta-
pehz ka tam ne kahda Dalliba
neds Ihpaſchums ar jums irr/ un
tas Swechneeks/ un tas Bah-
rinsch/ un ta Atraitne/kas tawâs
Wahrtis irr/ un ehdih̄ un pa-eh-
dih̄/ tadeht ka tas KUNGS
taws Deews tew swehti wiſſâ
tawu Rohku Darbâ/ ko tu darri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XV. Nodalla.
To feptitu Gaddu buhs allachin par Swabba-
dibas.Gaddu turreht : 1. Ta paſcha Teesas
un Likkumi: 2. Ne weenam Deedelneekam
buhs Israëla Starpâ buht: 4. Rà tohs
Mabbagus buhs apgahdaht : 7. Tohs Ei-
zibas.Brahtus/ kad tee jew pahrdewuſchees
buhs feptitâ Gaddâ atlaist : 12. Wiſu
Pirmdsimtibu buhs tam KUNGAM sweh-
tiht: 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "AP feptitu Gaddu buhs
Gr: Btew weenu Atlaifchanu
Gr: Aturreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis nu irr tahs Atlaifcha-
nas Darbs/ ka ikweenam Aisde-
wejan/ kas tawam Tuwakam ko
lab aisdewis irr/buhs atlaist/tam
ue buhs to no fawa Tuwaka/ jeb
no fawa Brahta atpraffiht/ ta-
pehz ka tam KUNGAM weena
Atlaifchana isfaukta tapputi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No ta Giwechtiteeka buhs
tew atpraffiht/ bet kas pee tawâ
Brahta irr/ to tam atlaid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bes ka/ kad Nabbagee ta-
wâ Starpâ ne buhs: jo tas
KUNGS swehtidams tew sweh-
tihs tai Semmê/ ko tas KUNGS
taws Deews par Ihpaſchumu
tew dohs wiꞥſch eemantobt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja tu tikai ta KUNGA
tawa Deewa Balkfnei klaufiſi/
turredams wiſſus schohs Banf-
lus/ ko es tew schodeen paiwehtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS taws
Deews tew swehtih̄ itt ka wiꞥſch
tew ruunajs irr/ tad aisdohti tu
dauds Tautahm/ bet tu ne ais-
nemti us Atdohſchanu/ un tu
waldisi pahr dauds Tautahm/ bet
wiꞥſnahin ne buhs pahr tew wal-
diht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tawâ Starpâ weens
Nabbags/ jeb kahds no tawecim
Brahteeem buhs/ jeb kahdas ta-
wâs Wahrtis tawâ Semmê/ ko
tas KUNGS taiws Deews tew
dohs/ tad tew ne buhs fawu Sir-
di apreppeht/ nedâ tawu Rohku
preefsch tawu nabbagu Brahl
aisflehgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet atwehrdains atwerri
wiꞥſnam tawu Rohku/ un ais-
dohd wiꞥſnam aisdohdains zec-
gann irr preefsch wiꞥſka Truhku-
ma/ kas wiꞥſnam trubkst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sargajs/ ka tawâ Sird
kahds Betiala Darbs ne efius/ ka-
tu fazzitu: tas feptihts Gade/ tas
Atlaifchanas Gads irr tuwu/ uu
tawu Azz buhtu tanna prett ta
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
